Barbershop 2: Back in Business (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $65,070,412Details
International Box Office $772,000
Worldwide Box Office $65,842,412
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$24,241,612 (37.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.68 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:98.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$18,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,711 opening theaters/2,711 max. theaters, 5.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $125,320,791

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 6th, 2004 (Wide) by MGM
International Releases: May 13th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: June 29th, 2004 by MGM Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for language, sexual material and brief drug references
Running Time: 106 minutes
Franchise: Barbershop
Plot point: African Americans
Social setting: Beauty Industry, Hood Film
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
